commentary_links.hebrew: לֹ֣א יַחֲלִיפֶ֗נּוּ וְלֹֽא־יָמִ֥יר אֹת֛וֹ ט֥וֹב בְּרָ֖ע אוֹ־רַ֣ע בְּט֑וֹב וְאִם־הָמֵ֨ר יָמִ֤יר בְּהֵמָה֙ בִּבְהֵמָ֔ה וְהָֽיָה־ה֥וּא וּתְמוּרָת֖וֹ יִֽהְיֶה־קֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
commentary_links.english: One may not exchange or substitute another for it, either good for bad, or bad for good; if one does substitute one animal for another, the thing vowed and its substitute shall both be holy.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: דכתיב לא יחליפנו ולא ימיר אתו &star אלא אמר

commentary_links.hebrew: וְסָמַ֣ךְ יָד֔וֹ עַ֖ל רֹ֣אשׁ הָעֹלָ֑ה וְנִרְצָ֥ה ל֖וֹ לְכַפֵּ֥ר עָלָֽיו׃
commentary_links.english: You shall lay a hand upon the head of the burnt offering, that it may be acceptable in your behalf, in expiation for you.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִם־זֶ֥בַח שְׁלָמִ֖ים קׇרְבָּנ֑וֹ אִ֤ם מִן־הַבָּקָר֙ ה֣וּא מַקְרִ֔יב אִם־זָכָר֙ אִם־נְקֵבָ֔ה תָּמִ֥ים יַקְרִיבֶ֖נּוּ לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
commentary_links.english:
If yourayour In this chapter, Heb. 3rd-person references to the offerer are rendered in the 2nd person, in accord with v. 17. offering is a sacrifice of well-beingbsacrifice of well-being In contrast to others “peace offering.” Exact meaning of Heb. shelamim uncertain.—
If you offer of the herd, whether a male or a female, you shall bring before GOD one without blemish.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תלת קרבנו כתיבי חד קרבנו ולא קרבן

commentary_links.hebrew: וְסָמַ֤ךְ יָדוֹ֙ עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ קׇרְבָּנ֔וֹ וּשְׁחָט֕וֹ פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד וְזָרְק֡וּ בְּנֵי֩ אַהֲרֹ֨ן הַכֹּהֲנִ֧ים אֶת־הַדָּ֛ם עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֖חַ סָבִֽיב׃
commentary_links.english: You shall lay a hand upon the head of your offering and slaughter it at the entrance of the Tent of Meeting; and Aaron’s sons, the priests, shall dash the blood against all sides of the altar.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תלת קרבנו כתיבי חד קרבנו ולא קרבן
